sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42509" key="e)riourgiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐριουργ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n42509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for wool-work,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[σφόνδυλος]</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
